starting_point_placeholder: e.g., Thu Thiem, Ho Chi Minh City
vinfast_warning: VinFast stations only charge VinFast vehicles
confirm_high_risk_body: At {{percent}}%, your estimated range nearly matches the manufacturer's claim. Real-world conditions in Vietnam — heat, AC, traffic, hills — will reduce it significantly.
no_charging_needed: No charging needed — you have enough range for the entire trip.
disclaimer: Actual range depends on speed, AC use, terrain, and cargo. eVoyage uses 80% of published range by default for a realistic estimate.
stations_no_stations: No charging stations found along this route
waypoints_suggestion: Try reordering stops, starting with a full charge, or choosing a longer-range vehicle
share_error: Couldn't create the image. Please try again.
share_expired: This trip link has expired. Please plan a new trip.
share_link_error: Couldn't create a short link. The full URL has been copied instead.
share_rate_limited: You've created too many links. Please wait a moment.
station_detail_basic_info: Only basic info available — detailed data couldn't be loaded
landing_hero_h1: Plan your EV road trip across Vietnam
landing_hero_subtitle: eVoyage calculates real-world range, finds charging stations along your route, and shows exactly where to stop — so you can drive with confidence.
landing_step1_desc: Pick from dozens of EVs sold in Vietnam — or enter your own battery and range specs.
landing_step2_desc: Enter your starting point, destination, and up to 5 stops along the way.
landing_step3_desc: See your battery level at every point, with optimal charging stops planned automatically.
landing_feat1_desc: Uses an 80% safety factor by default — realistic for Vietnam's heat, AC, traffic, and terrain.
landing_feat2_desc: Station data updated daily. See port count, power output, and live availability at a glance.
landing_feat3_desc: Mountain passes and steep sections are flagged so you know how terrain affects your range.
landing_feat4_desc: A visual timeline showing your charge level from departure to arrival — no surprises on the road.
landing_feat5_desc: Send a link or download a trip image. Great for planning with friends or saving for later.
landing_feat6_desc: Full bilingual support. Switch with one tap.
landing_models_subtitle: Plus any EV with custom specs
landing_faq1_a: By default, eVoyage uses 80% of the manufacturer's published range. This accounts for real-world conditions in Vietnam — heat, AC, heavy traffic, and hilly roads. You can adjust this in the battery settings.
landing_faq2_a: Yes — completely free, no account needed, no ads. eVoyage is open-source and community-driven.
landing_faq3_q: Does it work for non-VinFast EVs?
landing_faq3_a: Absolutely. eVoyage supports BYD, Tesla, and any other EV — just enter your battery capacity and range. Note: VinFast charging stations are exclusive to VinFast vehicles.
landing_faq4_q: How accurate is the station data?
landing_faq4_a: Station data is refreshed daily from VinFast's system and includes port count, power output, availability, and photos. Real-time conditions may still vary.
landing_faq5_q: How do I know if I'll make it?
landing_faq5_a: After planning, you'll see a battery chart showing your charge at every stop. If you're cutting it close, eVoyage automatically suggests charging stations along the way.
landing_faq6_a: Not yet — eVoyage needs an internet connection for route calculation and station data. Offline support is on the roadmap.
landing_built_with_ai_title: Built with AI, guided by a human
landing_built_with_ai_desc: eVoyage was entirely coded by Claude Code (Anthropic's AI coding agent). Duy's role is product manager — defining what to build, making design decisions, and ensuring quality. Duy is transparent about this because he believes AI-assisted development is the future, and you deserve to know how your tools are made.
landing_footer_tagline: Drive far, drive green — no range anxiety
feedback_category_prompt: What would you like to share?
feedback_ph_report: What happened? What did you expect to happen?
feedback_ph_feature: What feature would help you? Why?
feedback_ph_support: What do you need help with?
feedback_ph_station: Which station has incorrect info, and what's wrong?
feedback_ph_route: How was your trip? Anything unexpected?
feedback_email_hint: So we can follow up with you
feedback_email_required: We need your email to respond to support requests
feedback_success_reply: We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
feedback_error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
feedback_rate_limit: Too many submissions. Please wait a bit before trying again.
evi_greeting_first: Hi! I'm eVi. Tell me where you'd like to go!
evi_greeting_evening: Good evening! Let's plan your trip!
evi_placeholder: E.g., Go to Da Lat, VF8, battery 85%
evi_error_generic: Sorry, something went wrong. You can enter manually!
evi_not_trip: Hi! I'm eVi, your trip assistant. Tell me where you'd like to go!
evi_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Please allow mic in the popup and try again.
evi_mic_previously_denied: Microphone blocked. Tap the lock icon in your browser's address bar → allow microphone → reload.
evi_mic_unsupported: Your browser doesn't support microphone access. Try Chrome or Safari on HTTPS.
evi_no_speech: No speech detected. Tap the mic and try again.
evi_speech_network_error: Network error during voice recognition. Check your connection.
evi_speech_error: Voice input failed. Try again or type your trip.
evi_voice_unavailable: Voice unavailable. Please type your trip.
nearby_location_denied: Location access denied. You can search by address instead.
nearby_gps_denied: Allow location access to find stations near you
nearby_gps_unavailable: Couldn't determine your location. Try again?
nearby_gps_timeout: Location search took too long. Try again?
evi_station_search_intro: Here are {{count}} charging stations near you, compatible with {{vehicle}}:
evi_station_search_intro_no_vehicle: Here are {{count}} charging stations near you:
evi_no_vehicle_note: Select a vehicle for compatibility info
